{{Infobox character
| name = Jai Sen
| introduced = cradle-02-soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] is a member of the [[Jai clan]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5">''Soulsmith'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] is a spearman.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6">''Soulsmith'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] has reached the threshold of [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Jai Sen]] told a story about a spear.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|“I am Jai Sen, of the Jai clan whose honor echoes in every corner of the Blackflame Empire.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
